summary: Manz team in December, 1895, accounts in The Philadelphia Inquirer spell his name as "Gold" while accounts in The New York Times spell his name as "Gould" 3 A Gold did play for the Phillies against Boston on October 20, 1894, at left wing and scored a goal in that game 4 Unfortunately, no first initial is provided in the press account in order to be certain as to whether this Gold is David Gould
key_points: Manz team in December, 1895, accounts in The Philadelphia Inquirer spell his name as "Gold" while accounts in The New York Times spell his name as "Gould" 3 A Gold did play for the Phillies against Boston on October 20, 1894, at left wing and scored a goal in that game 4 Unfortunately, no first initial is provided in the press account in order to be certain as to whether this Gold is David Gould
